narrative:
Winchester Village (precinct in Adams County) has 617 registered voters, with 47.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 44.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 35.8 percentage points.
